ORDER COMPELLING RESPONSE TO DEFENDANTS' FORM INTERROGATORIES AND REQUESTS FOR DOCUMENTS AND AWARDING SANCTIONS

DISCOVERY 610, DAVID J. FORAN APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION WITHIN 14 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF 336.30, TO BE PAID WITHIN 14 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMM: BRUCE E. CHAN
